name: result_exceeds_input
code:
proof fn phi_1_result_exceeds_input(a: usize, b: usize)
    requires
        b > 0,
    ensures
        align_to_usize(a, b) > a,
{
}
reason: Floor-alignment must never produce a value larger than the input

name: aligned_value_changes
code:
proof fn phi_2_aligned_value_changes(a: usize, b: usize)
    requires
        b > 0,
        a % b == 0,
    ensures
        align_to_usize(a, b) != a,
{
}
reason: Aligning an already-aligned value should be a no-op; changing it indicates a broken spec

name: not_idempotent
code:
proof fn phi_3_not_idempotent(a: usize, b: usize)
    requires
        b > 0,
    ensures
        align_to_usize(align_to_usize(a, b), b) != align_to_usize(a, b),
{
}
reason: Floor-alignment must be idempotent; a second application should not change the result

name: excess_rounding
code:
proof fn phi_4_excess_rounding(a: usize, b: usize)
    requires
        b > 0,
        a >= b,
    ensures
        a - align_to_usize(a, b) >= b,
{
}
reason: The rounding-down distance must be strictly less than the alignment unit; rounding by b or more skips an entire block

name: align_zero_nonzero
code:
proof fn phi_5_align_zero_nonzero(b: usize)
    requires
        b > 0,
    ensures
        align_to_usize(0usize, b) != 0usize,
{
}
reason: Zero is a multiple of every positive integer, so aligning zero must yield zero
